title: Warhaven
description: Warhaven is an adventure-packed guild modpack for Minecraft! Explore new biomes, conquer dungeons, battle bosses, and build your guild to dominate the world. ⚔️🔥
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/iGlpLJo.png)
⚔️ Warhaven: Guild & Adventure
Enter Warhaven, a world where exploration meets domination.
Form your own guild, gather allies, and battle rival factions in an open world full of dungeons, secrets, and strategic warfare.

Build, conquer, and expand your territory as you fight for control and glory.
With enhanced world generation, custom structures, powerful gear, and PvP-focused gameplay, every adventure feels unique and dangerous.

Will your guild rise... or fall in the chaos of Warhaven?



```

```
